fixes: Upgraded Astro dependency range to ^7.0.6 after npm audit found Astro/esbuild advisories in the prior dependency set.
Strengthened workflow trace schema to include proof_type=fixture, real_telemetry=false, may_be_used_for_growth_claims=false.
Regenerated all workflow fixture traces under the stricter schema.
Added browserless visual mockups for admin dashboard and workflow trace.

checks.isolated_validators: passed all validate:* scripts except aggregate validate:all was separately run

notProven: real browser interaction with deployed URL
proofBoundaries.fixtureOnly: Workflow traces use faux data and are explicitly not production telemetry.
